title: Email Basics
drDigitalIntro: Email is how you send messages and documents over the internet. Unlike text messages, email is a more formal way to communicate — great for work, business, or longer conversations. Every email has a recipient (To), a subject line (what it's about), and a message body (your message). Email is free and can be used from any device. Mail is the app on your Mac that handles email.
drDigitalSuccess: You understand the basics of email!
drDigitalHint: Email is slower than text but works for everyone with an email address.
